panels.title: Masters Up
panels.description: Master targets currently scrapeable

panels.title: Request Rate by Component
panels.description: Aggregate request rate per component

panels.title: Build Info
panels.description: Running build per target (value is constant 1)

panels.title: Leader Changes
panels.description: Raft leadership changes

panels.title: Replica Placement Mismatch
panels.description: Volumes whose replica placement does not match policy

panels.title: Master Client Updates
panels.description: masterclient leader-connection updates by type

panels.title: Master Uptime
panels.description: time since master process start

panels.title: Under-replicated Volumes
panels.description: Volumes that do not have the desired replica count, by collection. 0 = healthy.

panels.title: Disk Resource (per location)
panels.description: Disk space per storage location

panels.title: Disk Errors
panels.description: Disk locations reporting an error (0 = healthy)

panels.title: Volume Slots Utilization
panels.description: Used volume slots as a percentage of max volumes, per volume server.

panels.title: Replication Operations
panels.description: Rate of replica fan-out operations on volume servers by type and result

panels.title: Replication Failures by reason
panels.description: Rate of replication failures broken down by operation and classified reason

panels.title: Replication Duration p99
panels.description: p99 duration of replicated write/delete operations (includes local apply + replica fan-out)

panels.title: Replication Fan-out (avg targets)
panels.description: Average number of replica targets per replicated operation

panels.title: Volume Creation Rate
panels.description: Rate of volume creation operations by result

panels.title: Object Size Distribution
panels.description: Size of newly-created objects

panels.title: Filer Sync Offset Lag
panels.description: Seconds behind source (filer.sync); only present when filer sync runs

panels.title: Time Since Last Subscription Send
panels.description: Seconds since the filer last sent to a metadata subscription (real event or idle heartbeat), per client/path. Low for healthy caught-up subscribers; clients that don't request idle heartbeats show time since the last real event.

panels.title: S3 In-flight Uploads
panels.description: in-flight upload count and bytes

panels.title: Bucket Quota & Read-only
panels.description: Quota bytes (and read-only flag) per bucket

panels.title: S3 Requests/sec by Bucket
panels.description: Per-bucket S3 request rate.

panels.title: S3 Response Codes by Bucket
panels.description: Per-bucket S3 responses by HTTP status code.

panels.title: S3 Request Duration p95 by Bucket
panels.description: Per-bucket p95 S3 request latency.

panels.title: S3 Time-to-First-Byte p95 by Bucket
panels.description: Per-bucket p95 S3 time to first byte.

panels.title: Lifecycle Cursor Lag
panels.description: now - min cursor timestamp

panels.title: Time Since Last Daily Walk
panels.description: 0/never excluded; lower is fresher
